I help developers master Claude Code through practical resources like the Claude Code Ultimate Bundle, and I work with startups and engineering teams to design and build production-ready AI products. (more at the end with AI Cheatsheet!)
Press enter or click to view image in full size

image by authorI received messages from my followers asking, How do I become an AI engineer?
A hundred AI Roadmap PDFs are floating around right now, and most of them were written before agents, MCP, and context engineering were even a sentence people said out loud.
And today, even a fresher is expected to have an idea of RAG, and it feels really difficult not knowing where to even start.
On the other hand, experienced developers who want to move into or level up in AI roles often get confused, as every phase I mentioned below gets into the pile of learning with their hands-on experience from their jobs and the system design part in addition.
